title: Quest 35929 Cordless 2 Colour LED Light Up Kettle / 1.7 Litre Capacity / 360° Swivel Base/Pop-Up Lid Opening/Boil-Dry Protection
features: DUAL LED ILLUMINATED KETTLE – This innovative 1.7 litre dual illuminated kettle will glow blue before and after the boiling process, and glow red when the water is at boiling point and ready to be used for your morning tea and coffee’s.

360° SWIVEL BASE – The electric kettle features a 360° swivel base that allows you access to the handle from any angle. The kettle also features clear water windows on both sides, making the viewing of the colour indicators clear and visible from each side of your worksurfaces.

AUTOMATIC LID OPENING – The kettle has a unique pop-up automatic lid opening system that allows you access to the inside of the unit with one swift push of a button. The kettle also features a large spout for ease of pouring, and a washable scale filter.

BOIL-DRY PROTECTION – For added peace of mind this cordless kitchen kettle comes complete with a boil-dry and overheat protection system that will automatically shut-off the power to the unit if it becomes too hot.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: From the manufacturer Quest Cordless Dual LED Illuminated Kettle The Quest brand wants to help you complete your kitchen look with modern looking appliances that look right at home in any kitchen, especially so with this Dual Illuminated LED Cordless 1.7L Kettle. IDEAL FOR…Creating the perfect hot drink at the flick of a button using Strix technology. EASY TO USE…Automatic Opening Lid makes it easy to fill up to its 1.7L capacity with 360° cordless base DUAL COLOUR ILLUMINATION…Colour change feature so you know when the kettle is boiled. Glows Blue before & after boiling, then Red when at boiling temperature. EXTRA FEATURES…The translucent water window is on both sides making it suitable for both left and right handed facing. Easy to remove and washable limescale filter to eliminate high build-up. Creating the perfect hot drink at the flick of a button...
